sections.heading: Document Overview
sections.content: The document is a court notice [3eb7e0b6d3c4] related to a case between M/s TechBuild Constructions Pvt. Ltd. and Mr. Vikram Nair [7f2958eec97d].

sections.heading: Parties Involved
sections.content: The parties involved are M/s TechBuild Constructions Pvt. Ltd. [7f2958eec97d] and Mr. Vikram Nair [7f2958eec97d].

sections.heading: Key Dates & Deadlines
sections.content: The key dates mentioned are June 10, 2023, March 20, 2024, and April 22, 2024 [UNSUPPORTED].

sections.heading: Financial Terms
sections.content: The amount of Rs. 14,75,000/- is mentioned as the final installment due on completion of construction [3eb7e0b6d3c4].

sections.heading: Key Obligations & Clauses
sections.content: The lease agreement [6c7ecceb60a5] mentions a lock-in period of 6 months, and the tenant is responsible for paying utilities [6c7ecceb60a5].

sections.heading: Flags & Risk Items
sections.content: The defendant contends that the work was incomplete/defective [3eb7e0b6d3c4].
